description: Energy-payment exposure replay showing Gazprombank's sanctions risk rising despite initial exemptions.

events.title: Gazprombank is subject to Ukraine/Russia-related sectoral sanctions directives
events.evidence: Gazprombank appears under Ukraine/Russia-related sanctions directives as a Russian financial institution.

events.title: Gazprombank becomes subject to EO 14024 Directive 3 restrictions on new debt and equity
events.evidence: Directive 3 restrictions apply to new debt/equity after effective date.

events.title: EU removes several Russian banks from SWIFT but spares Gazprombank for energy payments
events.evidence: Gazprombank is spared because it processes Russian oil and gas payments, creating continuing sanctions exposure.

events.title: Russia requires foreign gas payments through Gazprombank rouble-conversion mechanism
events.evidence: Putin decree makes Gazprombank central to foreign gas settlement and sanctions compliance risk.

events.title: UK extends licence allowing EU gas payments to Gazprombank despite sanctions wind-down
events.evidence: Exception management shows Gazprombank remains a high-risk energy-payment channel.

events.title: US imposes full blocking sanctions on Gazprombank
events.source: OFAC sanctions list / public sanctions coverage
events.evidence: Gazprombank's long-running exemption risk culminates in full blocking restrictions.
